name: Dell Technologies Inc.
summary: Dell Technologies is a global technology company operating in over 170 countries that designs, develops, manufactures, and sells a broad range of technology solutions. Its portfolio includes AI-optimized servers, traditional servers, networking, storage, and client devices such as PCs, notebooks, workstations, and peripherals. Dell also offers financing through Dell Financial Services, professional services, and cloud-native infrastructure solutions for enterprise, commercial, and consumer customers across two segments: Infrastructure Solutions Group and Client Solutions Group.

products.name: AI-Optimized Servers
products.description: Specialized servers designed for compute-intensive AI workloads including model training, fine-tuning, and inferencing.

products.name: Traditional Servers and Networking
products.description: General-purpose and mission-critical servers and networking infrastructure for modern IT environments.

products.name: Storage Solutions
products.description: Comprehensive storage portfolio including all-flash, software-defined, hyper-converged, and purpose-built data protection platforms.

products.name: Commercial PCs
products.description: Notebooks, desktops, and workstations targeting IT modernization and hybrid work transformation for business customers.

products.name: Consumer PCs
products.description: Essential computing and high-end gaming devices for everyday consumers and enthusiast users.

products.name: Peripherals
products.description: Displays, docking stations, keyboards, mice, webcam, and audio devices sold under the Dell brand.

products.name: Dell Payment Solutions
products.description: Financing and consumption options including utility, subscription, as-a-Service, leases, and loans for technology acquisition.

products.name: VxRail
products.description: Hyper-converged infrastructure solution integrating embedded VMware products and services for end-user customers.

products.name: Professional Services
products.description: Consulting, configuration, support, deployment, and extended warranty services for infrastructure and client solutions.

partnerships.description: Formerly distributed VMware standalone products; terminated Commercial Framework Agreement on March 25, 2024 following Broadcom's acquisition of VMware.
Integrates and embeds certain VMware products and services within the VxRail solution for end-user customers.
